mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth (GDPC1) signals robust economic activity, increasing corporate earnings expectations and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth exceeds 3% annualized but 20-day SPX returns are negative in >40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment (UNRATE) above 4.0% indicates deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing consumer spending and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: UNRATE exceeds 4.0% but 20-day SPX returns are positive in >50% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) signal tightening monetary policy, raising discount rates and depressing equity valuations for 20-day forward returns.
failure_condition: CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS both rise but 20-day SPX returns are positive in >60% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates (FEDFUNDS) during a monetary tightening cycle compress equity risk premiums, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: FEDFUNDS increases but 20-day SPX returns are positive in >50% of tightening cycle instances.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in industrial production (INDPRO) and rising employment (PAYEMS) indicate supply-side bottlenecks and labor market tightness, creating inflationary pressures that depress 20-day S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: INDPRO falls and PAYEMS rises but 20-day SPX returns are positive in >50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts (HOUST) below 1,300 thousand units signals weak demand for construction, reducing economic growth expectations and causing negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: HOUST falls below 1300 but 5-day SPX returns are positive in >50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Falling industrial production (INDPRO) during supply shocks reduces corporate output capacity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines but 60-day SPX returns are positive in >40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer spending (RSAFS) indicates strong demand for goods and services, boosting corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: RSAFS increases but 60-day SPX returns are negative in >40% of cases.
